description: A surface that reflects light to show images; to reflect or show back. 'Relua' names what shows truth—the surface that returns your gaze.
sound_symbolism: The word reflects back. 'Re' returns in reflection, image appearing. 'Lu' glows with light, surface bright. Then 'a' opens to truth revealed.
grammatical_notes: Noun: 'relua' (the mirror), for self-seeing and truth-showing. Reflecting has its own verb: 'themio' - 'mia themio.' (I reflect.)

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Mirror as teacher—reflection shows what we don't normally see, honest feedback.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Truth in reflection—the mirror reveals nature as it is, unfiltered beauty.
